goal: 修复 CR 发现的3个问题: ①补充合同外文件到关联范围 ②renderer消费shortcut-warning通知 ③清理INC占位符

coverage_checklist.contract_files_match: assert: 修改文件与合同 files_to_modify 一致
coverage_checklist.shortcut_consumed: assert: Settings 页面监听 onShortcutWarning 并显示提示
coverage_checklist.inc_placeholder_fixed: assert: crypto.ts 无 INC-... 占位符
